creator: freebsd@oldach.net
text:
We lost RRDs.pm, RRDp.pm and affiliates, but some perl5 stuff is still there:

# find /usr/local -name 'RRD*'                     
/usr/local/share/doc/rrdtool/html/RRDp.html
/usr/local/share/doc/rrdtool/html/RRDs.html
/usr/local/share/examples/rrdtool/rrdcached/RRDCached.pm
#
